rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"src/utils/ follows a co-located test pattern: each utility file has a sibling .test.ts","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"decision","text":"schema.ts provides a mini-Zod builder (s.string, s.object) worth reusing for config validation before reaching for full Zod","scope":"src/utils/schema.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"result.ts provides Result<T,E> discriminated union (Ok/Err) — prefer over throwing for validator errors","scope":"src/utils/result.ts"}]}
